calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-22-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-22-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Department 206 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up. Department 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Alisa J. Kim, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Midland Funding, LLC.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant Karen Perez.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Capital One Bank and against Defendant Karen Perez as follows:
Principal $8416.62
Pre-Judgment Interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $350.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $8766.62

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2015 Set For Trial On Feb-22-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2015 Set For Case Management Conference On Oct-21-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Jill Bates-Moore, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff. Plaintiff represented to the court that the settlement fell apart. A Case Management Conference is set to Oct-21-2015 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk EBura/KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-06-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-15-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Establishing Admissions
Off Calendar May-26-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted the tentitive ruling. PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S Motion For Order Establishing Admissions is granted without opposition. Moving party shall serve the Order on the attorney for the defendant with Notice of Entry. Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
